title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF ALBAY NORMAL SCHOOL TO BICOL TEACHERS COLLEGE

chunks.text:
H. No. 982 / 58 OG No. 48, 7831 (November 26, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3502, June 16, 1962 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF ALBAY NORMAL SCHOOL TO BICOL TEACHERS COLLEGE

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Albay Normal School is hereby changed to Bicol Teachers College.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 16, 1962.
